criteria.name: AI-Powered Budgeting
criteria.description: The app utilizes AI to automate budgeting processes, offering personalized insights and recommendations for managing finances effectively.

criteria.name: Expense Tracking
criteria.description: The app automatically tracks and categorizes expenses, providing users with a clear overview of their spending habits.

criteria.name: Savings Automation
criteria.description: The app uses AI to automate savings by analyzing spending patterns and setting aside money automatically.

criteria.name: Investment Management
criteria.description: The app provides AI-driven tools for investment analysis, portfolio management, and personalized investment recommendations.

criteria.name: Personalized Financial Advice
criteria.description: The app offers tailored financial advice and insights based on user data and spending behavior.

criteria.name: Account Aggregation
criteria.description: The app aggregates financial accounts into a single view, providing a holistic financial overview.

criteria.name: Subscription Management
criteria.description: The app helps users manage and cancel subscriptions to reduce costs.

criteria.name: Expense Management
criteria.description: The app streamlines expense reporting and integrates with accounting systems.

criteria.name: Credit Monitoring
criteria.description: The app monitors credit scores and provides credit improvement advice.

criteria.name: Bill Negotiation
criteria.description: The app negotiates bills on behalf of users to lower expenses.

criteria.name: AI Chatbot Assistant
criteria.description: The app features an AI-powered chatbot for personalized budgeting tips and financial insights.

criteria.name: Goal Tracking
criteria.description: The app helps users set and achieve financial goals with AI-generated insights.

criteria.name: Real-Time Budget Updates
criteria.description: The app tracks spending and updates users on their budget status in real time.

criteria.name: AI Stock Analysis
criteria.description: The app uses AI to provide in-depth stock analysis and investment recommendations.
